description: A supply planner needs to create the supply plan for a product family for the next month, balancing demand forecasts with production capacity.

nodes.task_description: Import the latest demand forecast for the product family.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully loads the demand data into the planning tool.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the available production capacity for the relevant manufacturing lines.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the available production hours for the next month.

nodes.task_description: Run the planning engine to generate a feasible master production schedule (MPS) that meets the forecast without exceeding capacity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a valid MPS, detailing which products to make, in what quantity, and when.
